column1: Dataset Title: Russian Arctic Vegetation Archive: Polar Ural 3 Vegetation Plots
Dataset Author: Mikhail Telyatnikov and Ekaterina Kudr

Dataset Reference: Telyatnikov, M.Yu., Khitun, O.V., Ermokhina, K.A. & Pristyazhnyuk, S.A. (2022). Vegetation of the ultramafic mountain massif Rai-Iz (upper reaches of the Enga-Yu River, the Polar Urals, Russia). Botanica Pacifica: A Journal of Plant Science and Conservation., 11(1), 37–50. https://doi.org/10.17581/bp.2022.11108
Dataset Table: Modified Species Cover Data for Polar Ural 3
Dataset Notes: Percentage species cover scale is used. Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
